findings.issue: flutter analyze --fatal-infos FAILS with 3 errors in D7 Patrol test files. This is the most fundamental universal gate and must pass.
findings.suggested_fix: Fix pumpAndSettle positional-arg calls in integration_test/date_mode_flow_test.dart and integration_test/distress_flow_test.dart (2 call sites).

findings.issue: Test suite is 1691/1691 — plan target was ≥5500. 99% per-layer coverage gate STILL unmet at aggregate (81.45% code-only). Progress from 886 → 1691 is substantial but the remaining gap is features/router/core.
findings.suggested_fix: Either (a) execute a focused test pass on features + router + core to reach 99% on code-only paths, (b) formally redefine the gate (99% on correctness-critical, 80% on UI) with a D-ID justification, or (c) ship with documented deferral.

findings.issue: Real-device Phase 16 matrix (items 10-17 of checklist) STILL not executed — plan marks these as ship gate. Patrol flows exist but have NOT been run on physical Android (Pixel+Samsung) + iOS 17+ devices.
findings.suggested_fix: Run device matrix on physical devices before any release build is promoted. Blocked by Block #1 (analyzer errors) which prevent CI builds.

findings.issue: 10 D-IDs claimed in WAL decisions_added never appear in decisions-log.md (prior finding). Plan requires every design discussion to land a D-ID.
findings.suggested_fix: Back-fill the missing D-IDs in decisions-log.md or renumber WAL entries to match existing decisions.

findings.issue: Goldens exist but are only 6 screens × 2 themes (+ 4 stealth variants). Plan wanted golden-per-widget AND per-locale stealth × 14 locales. The 14-locale RTL stealth goldens are NOT present.
findings.suggested_fix: Author 14-locale stealth goldens for stealth-mode home + session screens (minimum) to meet TEST-096/TEST-114.

findings.issue: A11y test files exist but are spot-checks (semantics_test.dart: 136 lines covers key widgets; font_scaling_test.dart: 72 lines). Plan wanted deep review across all 31 screens + TalkBack/VoiceOver manual verification.
findings.suggested_fix: Expand a11y coverage; add accessibility-tester manual run per Phase 12 roster.

findings.issue: Backup service still uses PBKDF2→AES-CTR+HMAC-SHA256 (TODO remains in backup_service.dart:32). Not AES-256-GCM per Phase 15.1.
findings.suggested_fix: Migrate to package:cryptography AES-256-GCM before ship, or formally accept with a new D-ID and audit trail.

findings.issue: Session screen widget test MISSING (30/31 screens covered). This is the single highest-value test gap — session_screen is the most critical user-facing screen and is at 0.91% coverage.
findings.suggested_fix: Add test/features/session/session_screen_test.dart that exercises HoldMode render, DateMode render, distress confirmation, pause banner, disarm action.

findings.issue: 4 Mode-editor widgets at 0% coverage (chain_step_tile, step_type_picker, step_config_form, event_specific_config). 299 total uncovered lines.
Robolectric + XCTest native unit tests still NOT added. Plan Phase 10 required both.
findings.suggested_fix: Add native test suites before shipping release builds OR explicitly scope out with a D-ID deviation.

findings.issue: Release-pipeline secrets (ANDROID_KEYSTORE_*, APPLE_*, SENTRY_*) still stubbed.
findings.suggested_fix: Product-owner action; confirm secrets are injected at CI level before first tagged release.

findings.issue: TaskUpdate journal alignment — not auditable from this session.
findings.suggested_fix: Confirm the TaskUpdate tree was maintained or document WAL+commits as sole source.

findings.issue: FakeCallConfig.fromJson null→'Mom' coercion bug still flagged but never ticketed with D-ID. Regression test still locks current behavior.
findings.suggested_fix: Fix the coercion + update test, or log the intentional behavior as a D-ID.

findings.issue: Significant progress since prior verification run: +805 tests, goldens landed, a11y tests landed, Argon2id PIN landed, phase-16 WAL written, D7 Patrol flows written. Critical deferrals remain but trajectory is positive.
findings.suggested_fix: Document progress in decisions-log.md to preserve audit trail.
